response: Phone: Samford played 12 games. Phone: They won twice as many games as they lost. Phone: So, they won 8 games and lost 4. Phone: In their wins, they scored 28 points per game. Phone: In their losses, they scored 14 points per game. Phone: Total points scored: (8 × 28) + (4 × 14). Phone: Calculating: 224 + 56 = 280. Phone: Therefore, Samford scored 280 points that season.
